intro: Automated deep analysis was unavailable this week, so here is a plain roundup of the week's notable military and business technology.

deep_dives.title: Troop cuts in Europe: Giving away something for nothing
deep_dives.what_happened: It’s not too late – if Washington is intent on reducing troop levels in Europe, it can still wield this bargaining chip with Russia.

deep_dives.title: Naval Group, MESKO and TELESYSTEM sign a sea firing trials agreement for demonstration
deep_dives.what_happened: On 19th June 2026, Naval Group, MESKO and TELESYTEM signed an agreement to demonstrate MESKO’s Piorun missile capacity onto Naval Group’s Rampart during future naval exercises. Naval Group press release This agreement marks the first step of a mutually beneficial strategic cooperation intended to support the future integration of the missile into the launching system. ... The post Naval Group, MESKO and TELESYSTEM sign a sea firing trials agreement for demonstration appeared first on Naval News .

deep_dives.title: Japan joins the global craze to field interceptor drones
deep_dives.what_happened: The interceptor drone systems are expected to be installed by 2027 near radar sites, bases, vessels and other critical locations, the agency stated.

deep_dives.title: Italy rejects aid scheme that buys US weapons for Ukraine’s defense
deep_dives.what_happened: NATO has said the Prioritised Ukraine Requirements List (PURL) mechanism has helped fund the purchase of air-defense systems, in particular.

deep_dives.title: Spanish Navy Tests Hornet Block 1 Interceptor from Santa María Frigate
deep_dives.what_happened: The Spanish Navy has conducted a test launch of the Hornet Block 1 interceptor from the F-81 Santa María frigate. The firing took place on 18 June 2026 as part of a joint demonstration with Destinus to evaluate containerised deployment of the system for ship-based air defence. The test involved the launch of a single ... The post Spanish Navy Tests Hornet Block 1 Interceptor from Santa María Frigate appeared first on Naval News .

deep_dives.title: Extraordinary Footage From Moscow Under Heavy Ukrainian Aerial Attack
deep_dives.what_happened: Ukraine's large-scale strike on Moscow, triggering massive explosions and fires, may indicate a new phase in the long-range air war. The post Extraordinary Footage From Moscow Under Heavy Ukrainian Aerial Attack appeared first on The War Zone .

deep_dives.title: Senate eyes Hegseth travel cuts without probes into Iran school bombing, boat strikes
deep_dives.what_happened: Senate lawmakers added a provision in the NDAA that would restrict Hegseth's travel expenses until the department releases certain operational information.

deep_dives.title: Congress Questions Air Force’s Combat Rescue Readiness As HH-60W Helicopters Get Turned Into VIP Transports
deep_dives.what_happened: It's clear the HH-60W fleet isn't ideal for the Pacific, but concerns are growing around the capacity of any dedicated combat rescue capabilities. The post Congress Questions Air Force’s Combat Rescue Readiness As HH-60W Helicopters Get Turned Into VIP Transports appeared first on The War Zone .
